generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors and type mismatches.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Ensure AGREE expressions use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
Base contracts on visible AADL features and declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the AADL model or declared within the AGREE annex.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Avoid modifying the underlying AADL architecture when fixing AGREE contract errors.
Do not attempt to repair contracts referencing implementation-level details in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope rules for annex placement
AADL component type vs. implementation scope
